title: GST/HST Credit Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST Credit Statistics
The GST/HST credit statistics tables present data based on the information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all individual recipients for a specific benefit year. For further information on the GST/HST credit please refer to the benefits section.

## Select a benefit year:
- 2024-2025 (2023 tax year)
- 2023-2024 (2022 tax year)
- 2022-2023 (2021 tax year)
- 2021-2022 (2020 tax year)
- 2020-2021 (2019 tax year)
- 2019-2020 (2018 tax year)
- 2018-2019 (2017 tax year)
- 2017-2018 (2016 tax year)
- 2016-2017 (2015 tax year)
- 2015-2016 (2014 tax year)
- 2014-2015 (2013 tax year)
- 2013-2014 (2012 tax year)
- 2012-2013 (2011 tax year)
- 2011-2012 (2010 tax year)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
